title: reservation-expired
description: Kafka event published by Inventory.ReservationExpiryWorker when a reservation TTL expires. v3 renames 'eventId' to 'messageId' and adds 'concertEventId'.

messageId.description: Unique ID of this Kafka message. Used for idempotency by consumers. Previously named 'eventId' in v1/v2.

reservationId.description: ID of the reservation that expired in bc_inventory.reservations.

seatId.description: ID of the seat that was held under the expired reservation.

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer who held the reservation. Used by Notification consumer.

concertEventId.description: ID of the concert/event the seat belongs to (from bc_inventory.reservations.event_id). Used by Waitlist consumer to locate the correct FIFO queue.

breaking_changes_from_v2: Field 'eventId' renamed to 'messageId' — existing consumers that do NOT read this field are unaffected.
New required field 'concertEventId' — consumers must ignore unknown fields or update their DTOs.
